caption: The video features three individuals seated on wooden chairs on a stage, engaged in a discussion. The person on the left, dressed in a white shirt and black pants, is actively speaking and gesturing with their hands, indicating they are explaining or emphasizing a point. The woman in the center, wearing a black t-shirt and black pants, is attentively listening, with her hands clasped together. The man on the right, in a gray suit, is also listening intently, with one leg crossed over the other. The background includes purple lighting effects and a large screen, suggesting a formal event or conference setting. A table with a computer motherboard is visible in front of the speaker on the left, hinting that the discussion might be related to technology or computing.
